calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-01-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-01-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: L. Jones.
Robert De Vries, Esq. for and with Plaintiff: William Ham was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant Dean Alac.
After hearing the testimony by counsel and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Liquidated Damages $103,200.00 from Aug. 2, 2006 through June 1, 2009.
Judgment signed in open court, see scanned doc. for details of the Judgment.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-26-2009 Failure To Post Jury Fees

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-28-2009 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Defendant in Propria Persona Dean Alac for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is heard this day. Defendant in Propria Persona is sanctioned $250.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is not re-set at this timed due to the proximity of the Trial Date. Proceedings reported by: Brenda Fields, CSR# 7235 (212)
